description: CompositionPurple boat neck t-shirt made of 65% polyester and 35% viscose, with graphic on the chest, dolman sleeves and belt FittingRegularWash careMachine or hand wash separatelyUse mild detergent onlyDo not bleach or wringUse mild detergent onlyDry in shadeMedium ironGet ready to party in this hot tee from jealous 21. The belted waist, dolman sleeves and swirly graphic print all add to the eye appeal of the top, while the slinky fabric skims your curves for a great look. Team this with skinny jeans, black heels and loads of silver bangles for a great party look.Model's statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-25"
